# Rabbia Ashraf - Clinical Child Psychologist
Global child psychology consultation and parent education platform.

## About
Rabbia Ashraf is a Clinical Child Psychologist, Researcher, Behavior Therapist, ASD & ADHD Intervention Specialist, and Child & Adolescent Mental Health professional based in Lahore, Pakistan.

## Core Philosophy
Instead of asking, "How do we stop this behavior?" we ask, "What is this behavior communicating?"

## Services
- Global Consultation: Online parent consultation and guidance.
- Autism Support: Parent training and support planning.
- ADHD Support: Executive function coaching.
- Parent Training: Structured behavioral strategies.
- Psychological Assessment: Available locally in Lahore.

## Disclaimer
Clinical therapy, diagnosis, and regulated psychological services are provided only where legally and ethically permitted. International consultations are educational, parent-guidance, and support-planning services.
